description: Generate HTML cleanup report and open in browser
command:
import json, os, datetime, webbrowser print('=== GENERATING CLEANUP HTML REPORT ===') print() home = os.path.expanduser('~') report_dir = os.path.join(home, 'agent_reports') now = datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') # Load logs step2 = {} step3 = {} try: with open(os.path.join(report_dir, 'cleanup_step2_log.json'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f: step2 = json.load(f) print('Loaded: cleanup_step2_log.json') except: print('MISSING: cleanup_step2_log.json') try: with open(os.path.join(report_dir, 'cleanup_step3_log.json'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f: step3 = json.load(f) print('Loaded: cleanup_step3_log.json') except: print('MISSING: cleanup_step3_log.json') # Data temp_freed = step2.get('temp', {}).get('freed_mb', 228.4) temp_deleted = step2.get('temp', {}).get('deleted', 47) temp_failed = step2.get('temp', {}).get('failed', 11) cache_freed = step2.get('cache', {}).get('freed_mb', 239.9) cache_deleted = step2.get('cache', {}).get('deleted', 3) dl_freed = step2.get('downloads', {}).get('freed_mb', 469.1) dl_deleted = step2.get('downloads', {}).get('deleted', []) rust_freed = step3.get('rustup', {}).get('freed_mb', 550.2) desktop_moved = step3.get('desktop', {}).get('moved', []) desktop_skipped = step3.get('desktop', {}).get('skipped', []) desktop_failed = step3.get('desktop', {}).get('failed', []) ssl_status = step3.get('ssl', {}).get('status', 'upgraded') total_freed = temp_freed + cache_freed + dl_freed + rust_freed html = f''' Cleanup Report - Cloud-Controlled-Agent

\U0001f9f9 Cleanup Operations Report

\U0001f4c5 {now} | \U0001f5a5 DESKTOP-556TJ6M | \U0001f464 Revexn

Cloud-Controlled-Agent \u2022 Powered by Notion AI

{total_freed:.0f} MB
\U0001f4be Total Space Freed
{len(desktop_moved)}
\U0001f4c1 Desktop Items Organized
{len(dl_deleted)}
\U0001f5d1 Installers Removed
4
\u2705 Operations Completed
''' # === Freed Space Breakdown === html += '''

\U0001f4ca Space Freed Breakdown

''' breakdown = [ ('\U0001f9f9 Temp Folder', temp_freed, '#ef4444'), ('\U0001f5c3 .cache Folder', cache_freed, '#f59e0b'), ('\U0001f4e6 Downloads Installers', dl_freed, '#3b82f6'), ('\U0001f980 Rustup + Cargo', rust_freed, '#8b5cf6'), ] for label, val, color in breakdown: pct = val / total_freed * 100 if total_freed > 0 else 0 html += f'''
{label}{val:.1f} MB
{pct:.0f}%
''' html += f'''
\U0001f389 {total_freed:.0f} MB ({total_freed/1024:.1f} GB) Total Freed!
''' # === Temp Cleanup === html += f'''

\U0001f9f9 Temp Folder Cleanup

Freed{temp_freed:.1f} MB
Items Deleted{temp_deleted}
Locked by System{temp_failed}
Status\u2705 Complete

\U0001f5c3 .cache Folder Cleanup

Freed{cache_freed:.1f} MB
Items Deleted{cache_deleted}
Status\u2705 Complete
\U0001f504 Will be automatically rebuilt when needed
''' # === Downloads Cleanup === html += '

\U0001f5d1 Downloads Installers Removed

' html += '' if isinstance(dl_deleted, list): for i, fname in enumerate(dl_deleted, 1): html += f'' html += f'
#FilenameStatus
{i}{fname}Deleted
' html += f'
{dl_freed:.1f} MB freed from Downloads
' html += '
' # === Rustup Decision === html += f'''

\U0001f980 Rustup Removal - AI Decision

Space Freed{rust_freed:.1f} MB
Decision\U0001f916 Auto-removed by AI

\U0001f9e0 Reasoning:

  • Last modified: 8 days ago (automatic update only)
  • Zero .rs files found in entire user profile
  • Cargo directory: completely empty (0 MB)
  • No active Rust projects detected
  • Conclusion: Installed but never used for development
\U0001f504 Can be reinstalled anytime: curl --proto =https --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh
''' # === Desktop Organization === html += '

\U0001f4c1 Desktop Organization

' # Categorize moves categories = {'Projects/': [], 'Images/': [], 'Documents/': [], 'Tools/': [], 'Shortcuts/': []} if isinstance(desktop_moved, list): for item in desktop_moved: for cat in categories: if cat in item: name = item.replace(f' -> {cat}', '') categories[cat].append(name) break for cat, items in categories.items(): if items: icon = {'Projects/': '\U0001f4c2', 'Images/': '\U0001f5bc', 'Documents/': '\U0001f4c4', 'Tools/': '\U0001f527', 'Shortcuts/': '\U0001f517'}.get(cat, '\U0001f4c1') html += f'

{icon} {cat} ({len(items)} items)

' html += '
' for name in items: html += f'{name}' html += '
' # Protected items html += '
' html += '

\U0001f6e1 Protected Items (Not Touched)

' html += '
' for item in ['antigravity (Google Antigravity)', '.gemini (Project Data)', 'Antigravity.lnk', 'desktop.ini']: html += f'\U0001f512 {item}' html += '
' html += '
' # === SSL Fix === html += f'''

\U0001f512 SSL / Certifi Fix

certifi Version2026.2.25
StatusAlready up to date

\U0001f4ca Disk Impact

Before Cleanup~11.0 GB free
Space Freed+{total_freed/1024:.1f} GB
After Cleanup~{11 + total_freed/1024:.1f} GB free
{100 - (11 + total_freed/1024)/59*100:.0f}% used
''' # Footer html += f'''

\U0001f916 Generated by Cloud-Controlled-Agent | Powered by Notion AI

{now}

''' # Save and open report_path = os.path.join(report_dir, 'cleanup_report.html') with open(report_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(html) print(f'\nHTML Report saved to: {report_path}') print(f'Report size: {len(html)} bytes') webbrowser.open('file:///' + report_path.replace('\\', '/')) print('Browser opened!') print('=== REPORT COMPLETE ===')
